# terrible_check_point_mgmt_cp_mgmt_domain_permissions_profile (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Object name.

### Optional

- `access_control` (String) Access Control permissions.<br>Only a 'Customized' permission-type profile can edit these permissions.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `color` (String) Color of the object. Should be one of existing colors.
- `comments` (String) Comments string.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `details_level` (String) The level of detail for some of the fields in the response can vary from showing only the UID value of the object to a fully detailed representation of the object.
- `edit_common_objects` (Boolean) Define and manage objects in the Check Point database, Network Objects, Services, Custom Application Site, VPN Community, Users, Servers, Resources, Time, UserCheck, and Limit.<br>Only a 'Customized' permission-type profile can edit this permission.
- `endpoint` (String) Endpoint permissions. Not supported for Multi-Domain Servers.<br>Only a 'Customized' permission-type profile can edit these permissions.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `events_and_reports` (String) Events and Reports permissions.<br>Only a 'Customized' permission-type profile can edit these permissions.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `gateways` (String) Gateways permissions. <br>Only a 'Customized' permission-type profile can edit these permissions.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ignore_warnings` (Boolean) Apply changes ignoring warnings.
- `management` (String) Management permissions.
- `monitoring_and_logging` (String) Monitoring and Logging permissions.<br>'Customized' permission-type profile can edit all these permissions. "Read Write All" permission-type can edit only dlp-logs-including-confidential-fields and manage-dlp-messages permissions.
- `others` (String) Additional permissions.<br>Only a 'Customized' permission-type profile can edit these permissions.
- `permission_type` (String) The type of the Permissions Profile.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `threat_prevention` (String) Threat Prevention permissions.<br>Only a 'Customized' permission-type profile can edit these permissions.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `cp_mgmt_domain_permissions_profile` (String) The checkpoint object created or updated.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
